'''Laine''' was a pilot trained by [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] at the [[Imperial Naval Academy/Legends|Prefsbelt IV Naval Academy]]. He mocked [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] for being from pacifistic [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].

{{Char-stub}}
